bug: ImageCard opens MediaUpload modal when clicking existing image
expected_behavior: Clicking ImageCard with existing image should only select the block, not open modal. User can replace image via toolbar/sidebar.
root_cause: ImageDropUploader component has onClick={open} handler on img element that always triggers MediaUpload modal
solution: Conditionally render plain img element when image exists (no click handler), show ImageDropUploader placeholder only when no image selected

modifications.after: import { className, fetchMedia, buildSrcSet, imagePosition } from '@taktdev/utilities';
modifications.reason: Import utilities needed for manual image rendering

modifications.code: const imageFile = image?.id ? fetchMedia( image.id ) : null;
modifications.reason: Fetch image data when image ID exists
Show plain img when image exists (no click), show ImageDropUploader placeholder when empty

preserved_functionality: MediaUploadPanel in sidebar still allows image replacement
Alt text control in sidebar still works
Drag-and-drop works when no image selected (ImageDropUploader placeholder)
Focal point styling applied via objectPosition
Fallback alt text from media library if custom alt not set

test_1.expected: ImageDropUploader placeholder shown, clicking opens MediaUpload modal

test_3.expected: Block selects, modal does NOT open

test_5.action: Set custom alt text via sidebar
test_5.expected: Custom alt text applied to img element

test_6.action: Set focal point via sidebar MediaUploadPanel
test_6.expected: objectPosition style applies focal point correctly

build_warnings: Standard webpack size warnings (editor.js 330 KiB, screen.js entrypoint 365 KiB)
